FML TAX.hours: Monday-Thursday 9:30 AM-6:30 PM EST, Friday 9:00 AM-3:00 PM EST
FML TAX.notes:
## ‼️IMPORTANT, Mandatory Script to Read BEFORE TRANSFER‼️

"Before I transfer you, I would like to let you know that if our tax specialist determines they may be able to assist with your tax matter, this is a fee-based service. Any fees and services will be explained before you make a decision. Is that okay?"
------------------------------------
"I see you are in the state of [STATE]. Is that correct?"
------------------------------------
"Excellent".
------------------------------------
"Before I continue, I want to clarify something important.
This is NOT A LOAN. It is important you understand this.
No money is being lend to you, and you are not applying for a loan.
The purpose of the consultation is for the specialist to review your tax situation and determine whether there may be tax resolution options, payment arrangements, or other programs available based on your circumstances."
------------------------------------
* Call Buffer: 120 Seconds 
* $10k+ in IRS Tax & State Tax.
* Must be Employed, Not on Benefits
* Must have received communication from IRS in last 2 years
* Must Not be in an active bankruptcy proceeding
* Not speaking to IRS or a Lawyer already 
* Do you currently have an active checking account?
* Are you looking for assistance with resolving your tax debt?
